Copied

Chinese shot put legend Gong Lijiao is in Paris for her fifth Olympic Games. The 35-year-old is defending her gold medal and is aiming to set her new personal best.

In an exclusive interview with Gong Lijiao, she shares her love-hate relationship with the event, her dreams, and her perspectives on women's strength.
